trackelementdesc_barghestchainlifttop01: The end of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up and over an incline into an overhanging drop. Coasters are held for a time at the top before being released down the track.
trackelementdesc_barghestchainlifttop02: The end of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up and over an incline into a drop.
trackelementdesc_blocksection:
Allows several trains to run on track at the same time, by stopping and holding trains until the next section of track is clear.

For free sections to be available, 1 more block section is needed than number of trains.

Chain lifts and the station also act as block sections.

Turn on Block Sectioned mode and add trains in the Ride Operations tab.
trackelementdesc_blockspin: Spinning cars are always locked and centred on this track piece.
trackelementdesc_bodyflumeendzone: The end section of a flume slide.
trackelementdesc_bodyflumeendzonetranspa: The transparent end section of a flume slide.
trackelementdesc_bodyflumeplughole: A round section that swirls guests before flushing them down a central cavity.
trackelementdesc_bodyflumeplugholeenclos: An enclosed, round section that swirls guests before flushing them down a central cavity.
trackelementdesc_bullwheelcap: A bull wheel cap allows the cable to return in the direction it was coming from.
trackelementdesc_cablehillrevbot: The base structure and second stage of a multi-part cable lift section that pulls trains backwards up an incline.
trackelementdesc_cablehillrevmid: The repeatable middle of a multi-part cable lift section that pulls trains backwards up an incline.
trackelementdesc_cablehillrevstart: The start of a multi-part cable lift section that pulls trains backwards up an incline.
trackelementdesc_cablehillrevtop: The end of a multi-part cable lift section that pulls trains backwards up an incline.
trackelementdesc_cablelift: A traditional propulsion system, where a cable pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_cableliftefn: EFN values for cable lift sections do not contribute to the final EFN ratings for the ride.
trackelementdesc_cableliftend: The end of a multi-part cable lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_cableliftendcurved: The end of a multi-part cable lift section that pulls trains up an incline and over a hill.
trackelementdesc_cableliftmid: The repeatable middle of a multi-part cable lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_cableliftreqs: Cable Lift rides require a Bull Wheel Cap at one end, and a Drive Station Wheel at the other end of the ride to operate, both of which must be adjacent to a station.
trackelementdesc_cableliftstart: The start of a multi-part cable lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_cabletowerbot: The base structure and second stage of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_chainhillbot: The base structure and second stage of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_chainhillmid: The repeatable middle of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_chainhillstart: The start of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_chainhilltop: The end of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_chainlift: A traditional propulsion system, where a chain pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_chainliftmid: The repeatable middle of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_chainliftstart: The start of a multi-part chain lift section that pulls trains up an incline.
trackelementdesc_channelentry: Descends the track into a channel of water.
trackelementdesc_channeltrack: Continues the track in a channel of water.
trackelementdesc_chicanesection: A section of track where karts weave from side to side.
trackelementdesc_closedflume: A fully enclosed piece of flume track.
trackelementdesc_contractsection: Starts a section of narrow track.
trackelementdesc_conveyorbeltchainstart: Lifts the track out of a channel of water onto a chain lift.
trackelementdesc_conveyorbeltchannelexit: Lifts the track out of a channel of water.
trackelementdesc_divedrophold: Holds trains for a time before releasing them down a dive drop.
trackelementdesc_drivestationwheel: A drive station track element that moves the cable and allows the ride to operate.
trackelementdesc_drivetyres: Tyres embedded in the track push the train forward at a slow speed between utility track pieces.
trackelementdesc_dualdirectionbooster: Launches trains in either direction with a magnetic propulsion system.
trackelementdesc_eddycurrentspin: Uses an electromagnetic current to change the spin speed of coaster cars.
trackelementdesc_efnvalues: EFN values for this track piece do not contribute to the final EFN ratings for the ride.
trackelementdesc_expandsection: Ends a section of narrow track.
trackelementdesc_flumebehemothbowl: A huge, round section that swirls rafts before sending them down a central channel.
trackelementdesc_flumebehemothbowlenclos: An enclosed, round section that swirls rafts before sending them down a central channel.
trackelementdesc_flumeboomerang: A large vertical slide that takes guests up and around.
trackelementdesc_flumeconveyorbelt: The repeatable middle of a multi-part conveyor belt section that pulls guests up an incline.
trackelementdesc_flumeconveyorbeltentran: The start of a multi-part conveyor belt section that pulls guests up an incline.
trackelementdesc_flumeconveyorbeltexit: The end of a multi-part conveyor belt section that pulls guests up an incline.
trackelementdesc_flumefigure8loop: A section that descends in two consecutive sideways loops.
trackelementdesc_flumeflytrap: A huge valley slide that sends rafts to and fro before continuing down the flume.
trackelementdesc_flumefunnel: A section that turns 90° and sends rafts back and forth down a large cone.
trackelementdesc_flumefunnelenclosed: An enclosed section that turns 90° and sends rafts back and forth down a large cone.
trackelementdesc_flumehighsideleft: This piece is raised on the left side.
trackelementdesc_flumehighsideright: This piece is raised on the right side.
trackelementdesc_flumeloop: A section that descends in a single sideways loop.
trackelementdesc_flumeoscillator: A section that turns 90° and sends guests down an open, swirling channel.
trackelementdesc_flumeoscillatorenclosed: A section that turns 90° and sends guests down an enclosed, swirling tunnel.
trackelementdesc_flumepipetransparent: A fully enclosed piece of transparent flume track.
trackelementdesc_flumespeedbowl: A huge, round section that swirls guests at high speed before flushing them down a central cavity.
trackelementdesc_flumespeedbowlenclosed: An enclosed, round section that swirls guests at high speed before flushing them down a central cavity.
trackelementdesc_flumesphere: A round, enclosed section that tumbles and turns guests.
trackelementdesc_flumestart: The open-topped start to a flume.
trackelementdesc_flumestartalt: The enclosed start to a flume.
trackelementdesc_flumestartalttransparen: The transparent, enclosed start to a flume.
trackelementdesc_flumestarttransparent: The transparent, open-topped start to a flume.
trackelementdesc_flumestartvertical: An enclosed start to a flume that drops guests vertically.
trackelementdesc_flumeundulating: A bumpy section that rocks guests up and down.
trackelementdesc_flumeuphillwaterjet: The repeatable middle of a multi-part water jet section that pulls guests up an incline.
trackelementdesc_flumeuphillwaterjetentr: The start of a multi-part water jet section that pulls guests up an incline.
trackelementdesc_flumeuphillwaterjetexit: The end of a multi-part water jet section that pulls guests up an incline.
trackelementdesc_frictionbrakes: Applies brake pads to slow trains down with the power of friction.
trackelementdesc_frictionwheellift: Tyres embedded in the track push the train up an incline.
trackelementdesc_fronttwisttower: A vertical tower that twists trains facing frontwards.
trackelementdesc_halfpipetransparent: An open-topped piece of transparent flume track.
trackelementdesc_hydrauliclaunch: A hydraulic propulsion system used to launch trains along the track at speed.
trackelementdesc_lim: A magnetic propulsion system used to launch trains along the track at speed.
trackelementdesc_limdual: Launches trains in either direction with a magnetic propulsion system.
trackelementdesc_logdropend: Ends a drop with standard track.
trackelementdesc_logdropmid: Continues a drop with standard track.
trackelementdesc_logdropstart: Starts a drop with standard track.
trackelementdesc_logliftend: The end of a multi-part conveyor belt section that pulls cars up an incline.
trackelementdesc_logliftmid: The repeatable middle of a multi-part conveyor belt section that pulls cars up an incline.
trackelementdesc_logliftstart: The start of a multi-part conveyor belt section that pulls cars up an incline.
trackelementdesc_logsplashend: The end of a multi-part splashdown section designed to drench riders.
trackelementdesc_logsplashmid: The repeatable middle of a multi-part splashdown section designed to drench riders.
trackelementdesc_logsplashstart: The start of a multi-part splashdown section designed to drench riders.
trackelementdesc_lsm: A magnetic propulsion system used to launch trains along the track at speed.
trackelementdesc_lsmdual: Launches trains in either direction with a magnetic propulsion system.
trackelementdesc_lsmholdingsection:
Holds trains before launching them with a magnetic propulsion system.

Designed for use at the start of a run of LSM sections.
trackelementdesc_magneticbrakes: Slows trains down with the power of magnets.
trackelementdesc_normaltrackhbeam: Standard track with only H-Beam style supports.
trackelementdesc_openflume: An open-topped piece of flume track.
trackelementdesc_pneumaticlaunch: A pneumatic propulsion system used to launch trains along the track at speed.
trackelementdesc_raftflumeultrawidepipe: A huge, curved pipe section that whirls guests before dropping them off the flume.
trackelementdesc_raftflumeultrawidepipee: An enclosed, curved pipe section that whirls guests before dropping them off the flume.
trackelementdesc_reartwisttower: A vertical tower that twists trains facing backwards.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidsstandardrapi: A section of track with swirling, turbulent water.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswideend: Narrows a wide section into standard track.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswideleftend: Narrows a wide section into standard track.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswideleftmid: Continues a wide section on the left.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswideleftrapi: A wide section of track with swirling, turbulent water.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswideleftstar: Opens the track into a wide section on the left.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswiderapids: A wide section of track with swirling, turbulent water.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswiderightend: Narrows a wide section into standard track.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswiderightmid: Continues a wide section on the right.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswiderightrap: A wide section of track with swirling, turbulent water.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswiderightsta: Opens the track into a wide section on the right.
trackelementdesc_riverrapidswidestart: Opens the track into a wide section.
trackelementdesc_runoutlane_deep: Brings guests to a stop in a deep channel of water.
trackelementdesc_runoutlane_shallow: Brings guests to a stop in a shallow channel of water.
trackelementdesc_spinbrake: Spinning cars can be locked and centred on this track piece.
trackelementdesc_spincoasterhtracklocked: Standard spin coaster track with only H-Beam style supports.
trackelementdesc_spinningstart: A standard track piece that allows cars to spin freely.
trackelementdesc_spinningstop: Spinning cars can be locked and centred on this track piece.
trackelementdesc_station: Station where guests board and disembark trains.
trackelementdesc_stationgondolas: Station where guests board and disembark gondolas.
trackelementdesc_stationleftright: Left side entrance and right side exit.
trackelementdesc_stationload: Station where guests only board trains.
trackelementdesc_stationrightleft: Right side entrance and left side exit.
trackelementdesc_stationunload: Station where guests only disembark trains.
trackelementdesc_stopstart: Allows the ride to stop for a set amount of time before continuing.
trackelementdesc_tirelaunch:
Tyres embedded in the track launch the train forward at high speed.

Can be used in conjunction with a Friction Wheel Lift to create a dual stage tyre launch.
trackelementdesc_tk501bungeelift: A lift track piece that springs up and down before rising to the top and releasing cars down the track.
trackelementdesc_tk501combinedlift: A lift track piece that drops cars to a secondary circuit, then lifts them back to the main track on re-entry.
trackelementdesc_tk501combinedliftdropfo: A lift track piece that raises cars to a secondary circuit, then drops them back to the main track on re-entry.
trackelementdesc_tk501droptrack: A track piece that descends vertically to connect with a secondary track.
trackelementdesc_tk501edgetilt: Tilts cars forwards, before releasing them backwards down the track.
trackelementdesc_tk501motiontable: A rotating track piece that tilts and turns before releasing cars down the track.
trackelementdesc_tk501switchtrack: A piece that rolls cars along a track, then switches over to release them down a secondary track.
trackelementdesc_tk501teetertotter: A tilting track piece that rocks backwards and forwards before releasing cars down the track.
trackelementdesc_tk501turntable: A track piece that rotates before releasing cars down the track.
trackelementdesc_tk502doublelift: A tower that lifts cars vertically to a set height.
trackelementdesc_tk509tilttrack: A track piece that holds cars and tilts them forwards 90° towards the ground, before releasing them down the track.
trackelementdesc_tk_515_fastswitch_branc: Pass-by Switch - Left Split - Exit on Curve
Pass-by Switch - Left Split - Exit Straight
Pass-by Switch - Right Split - Exit on Curve
Pass-by Switch - Right Split - Exit Straight
trackelementdesc_tk_515_fastswitch_merge: Pass-by Switch - Rear Left Split - Enter Curve, Exit Backwards
Pass-by Switch - Rear Left Split - Enter Straight, Exit Curving Backwards
Pass-by Switch - Rear Left Split - Enter Curve, Exit Straight
Pass-by Switch - Rear Left Split - Enter Straight, Exit Straight
Pass-by Switch - Rear Right Split - Enter Curve, Exit Backwards
Pass-by Switch - Rear Right Split - Enter Straight, Exit Curving Backwards
Pass-by Switch - Rear Right Split - Enter Curve, Exit Straight
Pass-by Switch - Rear Right Split - Enter Straight, Exit Straight
trackelementdesc_tk_515_flatswitch_merge: Flat Pass-by Switch - Rear Left Split - Enter Curve, Exit Backwards
Flat Pass-by Switch - Rear Left Split - Enter Curve, Exit Straight
Flat Pass-by Switch - Rear Right Split - Enter Curve, Exit Backwards
Flat Pass-by Switch - Rear Right Split - Enter Curve, Exit Straight
trackelementdesc_tk_515_turntable_22_5l_: Turntable - Pass-by then Left Turn, Exit Backwards
Turntable - Left Turn then Pass-by, Exit Backwards
trackelementdesc_tk_515_turntable_22_5r_: Turntable - Pass-by then Right Turn, Exit Backwards
Turntable - Right Turn then Pass-by, Exit Backwards
trackelementdesc_tophat_down: Continues the drop on a top hat section.
trackelementdesc_tophat_downleft: Continues a drop section to the left.
trackelementdesc_tophat_downright: Continues a drop section to the right.
trackelementdesc_tophat_up: Continues the incline on a top hat section.
trackelementdesc_tophat_upleft: Veers to the left to start a drop.
trackelementdesc_tophat_upright: Veers to the right to start a drop.
trackelementdesc_towerbase: Slopes uphill into a vertical tower.
trackelementdesc_towerext: Extends the height of a vertical tower.
trackelementdesc_towertop: The top of a vertical tower.
trackelementdesc_track2: Standard track with an alternate style.
trackelementdesc_trimbrakes: Used to slightly slow trains mid-run, to ensure safe ride operation.
